description_long: This bird features a slender, elongated body with a long neck and sharp, pointed beak. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray to black, with lighter gray on the head and neck, and a striking crest of feathers atop its head. The wings are long and narrow, extending well beyond the body, and the tail is distinctly pointed with elongated feathers. The legs are thin and yellow, ending in three forward-facing toes and one rear toe, suitable for perching or wading. The eyes are prominent and round, giving the bird a keen, alert expression.
description: A slender, dark gray bird with a long neck, pointed beak, crested head, and elongated wings and tail feathers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical wingspan, pointed beak, and prominent crest on the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sharp beak, spiky crest, and the curvature of the neck and tail feathers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pointed tail, narrow body, and the full extension of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the elongated neck, open beak, and the layered structure of the tail feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray body with lighter gray head and neck, and a spiky crest
